meaning: n.卜塔(古埃及人尊奉的孟斐斯城主神,被认为是人类和众神之父、万物之主)
examples: Memphis reached a peak of prestige under the 6th Dynasty as a centre of the cult of Ptah.
The remains of the temple of Ptah and of Apis have been uncovered at the site as well as a few statues, including two four-metre ones in alabaster of Ramesses II.
Routine paraffine sections were made for PTAH staining and data of cell area, nuclear area, ratio of nucleus to cytoplasm, nuclear ellipticity were measured by image computer analyzer.
